channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump transition team suggests sidelining top adviser over pay-to-play allegations
item.description: The top lawyer on Donald Trump’s transition team has investigated a longtime adviser to the president-elect over allegations he used his proximity to Trump to score payments from those seeking roles or influence in the new administration.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump 2.0 has a Cabinet and executive branch of different ideas and eclectic personalities
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump’s personnel choices for his new Cabinet and White House reflect his signature positions on immigration and trade but also a range of viewpoints and backgrounds that raise questions about what ideological anchors might guide his Oval Office encore.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Special counsel moves to abandon election interference and classified documents cases against Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Special counsel Jack Smith moved to abandon two criminal cases against Donald Trump on Monday, acknowledging that Trump’s return to the White House will preclude attempts to federally prosecute him for retaining classified documents or trying to overturn his 2020 election defeat.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, ERIC TUCKER and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex allegations against Trump picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Judge grants Jack Smith request to dismiss Jan. 6 charges against Trump, appeal dropped in Florida docs case
item.description: The federal case against President-elect Donald Trump, which stemmed from Smith's investigation into the Jan. 6 U.S. Capitol breach, was dismissed on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. emerges as a political force of his own as he helps his father launch a second term
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Donald Trump, House Speaker Mike Johnson, Elon Musk and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. circled up aboard the president-elect’s plane over some McDonalds burgers and fries recently, Donald Trump Jr. was seated in the center of that power foursome.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump transition: Poll shows people approve of picks for new admin
item.description: A CBS News poll shows 59% of people surveyed approve of the way Trump is handling his transition to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Shafer, NewsNation

item.title: New Arizona Democrat weighs in on her win and Harris’s loss
item.description: Arizona Rep.-elect Yassamin Ansari (D) shared why she thinks she won in her swing state but Vice President Harris didn’t, while also weighing in on immigration as President-elect Trump prepares his deportation crackdown.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Fred Harris, former US senator from Oklahoma and presidential hopeful, dies at 94
item.description: Fred Harris, a former U.S. senator from Oklahoma, presidential hopeful and populist who championed Democratic Party reforms in the turbulent 1960s, died Saturday. He was 94. Harris’ wife, Margaret Elliston, confirmed his death to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump rounds out health team with CDC, FDA picks
item.description: President-elect Trump rounded out his health team for his upcoming White House term with a flurry of Friday announcements.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: In deep blue Minneapolis, many Somali voters withheld support for Harris
item.description: According to state elections data, support for Vice President Kamala Harris in parts of Minneapolis with concentrations of East African immigrants and Somali voters was weaker than in the city as a whole.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Bezos, Musk rivalry heats up ahead of Trump’s second term
item.description: A social media spat between Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos this week underscored a sharpening rivalry between two of the world’s richest men at a time when both are trying to grow their sprawling business empires in President-elect Trump’s second term.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Trump names Seb Gorka, Alex Wong to be senior national security staff
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped his first term alums Alex Wong and Sebastian Gorka to join his national security team for his second go-around.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fox News contributor Janette Nesheiwat tapped as Trump's surgeon general
item.description: President-elect Trump named Janette Nesheiwat, a Fox News contributor and medical doctor in New York and New Jersey, as his nominee for surgeon general in his second administration. "I am proud to announce that Dr. Janette Nesheiwat will be the Nation’s Doctor as the United States Surgeon General.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: State GOP, Dems react to Trump selecting Pam Bondi to be next AG
item.description: Former Florida Attorney General and Temple Terrace native Pam Bondi has been selected to be President-elect Donald Trump’s next U.S. Attorney General.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Applicants sue Minnesota’s Office of Cannabis Management over disqualification
item.description: The OCM turned to a lottery because more than 1,800 applicants had sought 282 licenses. This week, regulators disqualified two-thirds of the applicants for a variety of reasons.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic and Feven Gerezgiher, MPR News

item.title: New York judge calls off Trump hush money sentencing
item.description: President-elect Trump’s sentencing in his New York criminal case will not go forward as planned next week as his attorneys push to dismiss the prosecution following his election victory. Judge Juan Merchan, who oversees the trial proceedings, announced the adjournment in a letter Friday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, PIX 11

item.title: What to know about Pam Bondi, Trump's new pick for attorney general
item.description: Pam Bondi, the former Florida attorney general, is Donald Trump’s new pick to serve as U.S. attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Colleen Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tabke wins Shakopee-area legislative race after recount, House control still unknown
item.description: The results are unofficial because four ballots are still in dispute. Tabke’s margin of victory widened by one vote from an earlier count.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz withdraws as Trump's pick for attorney general
item.description: Matt Gaetz has withdrawn as President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for attorney general following scrutiny over a federal sex trafficking investigation. The Florida Republican made the announcement Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Police report reveals assault allegations against Hegseth
item.description: A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Nevada attorney general pledges to combat 'unconstitutional mandates' amid Trump election
item.description: Democratic Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford said his office was prepared to address any “fear and uncertainty” following the election of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News
